title: Summon global cooldown
description: Ensure summon commands are protected by a global per-player cooldown such as 3 seconds between summons, including an explicit cooldown error response.
success_criteria: A player cannot summon repeatedly within the configured cooldown window.
Cooldown failures return an ERROR with a clear cooldown reason.
The change stays in the game-mode logic.
risk_points: Cooldown may accidentally apply globally to both players instead of per player.
Cooldown updates may not tick down correctly.
